name: Oat Bran Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Safflower oil (or any vegetable oil)
2 cups Plus 2 tablespoons very warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Get ready for a 3-4 pound loaf.
2. Place yeast in the bottom of the Auto Bakery.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients except liquid into the pan in the order listed.
4. Add 1 cup plus the 2 tablespoons of very warm water.
5. Select white bread and press "Start."
6. Leave the lid open until a minute, as the machine mixes the dough.
7. Slowly add the remaining very warm water.
This recipe is very large and may kick up some flour over the edge or on the glass dome at the beginning. Adding the liquid slowly will help prevent this. The pan will be very full and the bread won't rise much. But, it will be a tall loaf. If your loaf rises too much, cut down on the liquid. If it seems too dry, increase the liquid.
Note: Try adding 1/2 cup walnuts.
